name: Fire Assembly Point Sign
shortDescription: Weatherproof outdoor muster-point signage for evacuation drills.
longDescription: Assembly point signage marks the designated muster location where staff report during an evacuation. Manufactured on weatherproof aluminium composite or retro-reflective sheeting for outdoor yards and car parks, with optional post-mounting kit and site-specific text.

images.alt: Fire Assembly Point Sign supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Customisation
specs.value: Site name and zone number available
